name: io.github.dearlordylord/obs-mcp
title: OBS MCP
description: MCP server for OBS Studio websocket automation and read-only resources

environmentVariables.name: OBS_WEBSOCKET_URL
environmentVariables.description: OBS websocket URL. Omit to use ws://localhost:4455.

environmentVariables.name: OBS_WEBSOCKET_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: OBS websocket password, when authentication is enabled.

environmentVariables.name: OBS_WEBSOCKET_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Connection and request timeout in milliseconds. Omit to use the package default.

environmentVariables.name: TOOLSETS
environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated toolset filter. Supported values: admin_raw, batch, canvases, config, events, filters, general, inputs, outputs, record, scenes, screenshots, stream, transitions, ui, vendor.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: MCP transport mode: stdio or http. Omit to use stdio.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: HTTP bind host when MCP_TRANSPORT=http. Omit to use 127.0.0.1.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: HTTP bind port when MCP_TRANSPORT=http. Omit to use 3000.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token required by HTTP MCP clients when MCP_TRANSPORT=http.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_SESSION_MODE
environmentVariables.description: HTTP session mode when MCP_TRANSPORT=http: stateful or stateless. Omit to use stateful.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_SESSION_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Idle timeout in milliseconds for stateful HTTP sessions. Omit to use 1800000.

environmentVariables.name: OBS_EVENT_BUFFER_CAPACITY
environmentVariables.description: Optional event buffer capacity for event tools.

environmentVariables.name: OBS_MCP_SCREENSHOT_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Optional directory used by screenshot save tools.
